titleStmt.title: SII 19.348: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 348. (A.R. No. 630 of 1907.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, UMĀ-MAHĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers an agreement given by five servants of the temple at Tirunallam a brahmadēya in Veṇṇāḍu to provide specifled offerings and worship to god Gaṇapati-Bhatārar during the three services in the temple, out of an endowment of 7 mā of land made by a body called the Paramēśvara-Pēriḷamaiyār of the village. This is probably a record of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmarkku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyan tirunallattu śrīkoyiluṭaiya kaviciyaṉ muṉṉūṟṟuvanakkaṉum kaviciyaṉ cāttaṉ cantira cekaranum kaviciyaṉ nakkaṉ tarukkaṉum kaviciyaṉ cāttaṉ cāttaṉum kaviciyaṉ cāttaṉ nakkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa śrīkoyiluṭaiyom
Ivvūr parameśvaraperiḷamaiyār gaṇapatiyārkkuk kuṭutta nilam Ivvūrk kiḻur nilam Iṉṉilam Aṟumāvukkum Ellai kiḻpāṟkellai tirukkiḻkkoṭṭamuṭaiya mahādevar nilat tukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Idevar nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vāyk kālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ānāṟṟukku teṟkum Āka
vicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilam Aṟumāvum Inṉam kiḻūrt turuttiyil nilam Oru māvukkum Ellai kiḻpālkellai tirunallamuṭaiya mahādevar nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Āritaṉ cāmiciṅkaṉum tampimār nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkel
lai kuḷattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai vāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Icaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilam Iṉnilam Oru māvum Ākat taṭi Iraṇṭā Iṉnilam Eḻumāvum Ivāṭṭaic cantirātittaval Iṉṉilam Anupavittu Igaṇapati
bhaṭārarkku niccaṟpaṭi ceyyakkaṭava paṭimāṟṟāvatu ciṟukālaisantiyil tiruvamurtu Arici nānāḻiyum Ucciyampotai santiyil Arici nānāḻiyum Irāvai santiyil Arici Irunāḻiyum Ākak kuttalpūri patināḻiyum muṉ[ ṟu sa] nti[ kkum] Āka neyamutorupiṭiyum nāḻi Uḻakku nelliṉ kaṟiyamutum tai
yiramutu nāḻiuriyum Aṭaikkāyamutu Āṟum Āka niccaṟpaṭi cantirātittaval Iṉṉilam Eḻu māvum tāṅkaḷ veṇṭumvaṇṇam Anupavittu cantirātittaval Iṉṉivattam ceyvom Ānom Ivvūr tirukkoyiluṭaiyom pa[ nmā] heśvararakṣai ....
Digital edition of SII 19.348 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
